workshops.title: Open Studio
workshops.schedule:
Open studio access for registered participants. Matthew Forehand and studio staff support print and mixed-media work.

See Oolite Arts calendar for current hours and registration.
workshops.description: Open studio time with support from Matthew Forehand and staff—ideal for print and mixed-media practice.
outcomes: Access studio resources with guidance
Advance ongoing projects in a shared environment
materials: See class materials list for your medium
workshops.content: Open Studio offers dedicated time to work in the studio with support from Matthew Forehand and staff. A strong fit for artists working in print and mixed media. Confirm dates and registration on the Oolite Arts calendar.

workshops.title: PRINTshop Open Hours
workshops.schedule: For Dates and Times See Calendar
workshops.description: PRINTshop access hours for qualified members and students—check the calendar for the current schedule.
outcomes: Use print facilities during published open hours
prerequisites: Qualifying orientation or course completion as required by Oolite
workshops.content: PRINTshop Open Hours provide access to print facilities. Dates and times vary; always confirm on the Oolite Arts calendar before visiting.

workshops.title: Figure Drawing Studio
workshops.description: Weekly figure drawing sessions on Monday evenings.
outcomes: Practice figure drawing from life or guided poses
Build a consistent weekly studio habit
workshops.content: Figure Drawing Studio meets Mondays, 7–9 p.m., except holidays. Focus on observational drawing and sustained practice.

workshops.title: Impressionist Flower Painting
workshops.schedule:
Four-Week Course
Sundays
April 19 - May 10, 2026
10:00 a.m. - 1:00 p.m.
workshops.description: Four-week acrylic painting course focused on impressionist flower painting.
outcomes: Paint floral subjects with impressionist color and brushwork
Complete a small series of studies
workshops.content: Impressionist Flower Painting is a four-week course exploring color, light, and painterly handling of floral subjects in acrylic. Sundays, April 19 – May 10, 2026, 10:00 a.m. – 1:00 p.m.

workshops.title: Painting with Acrylic or Oil
workshops.schedule:
6-Week Course
Tuesdays
April 21 - May 26, 2026
10 a.m. - 1 p.m.
workshops.description: Six-week painting course in acrylic or oil—Tuesday mornings.
outcomes: Mix color and handle paint in acrylic or oil
Develop compositions from observation or reference
workshops.content: Painting with Acrylic or Oil is a six-week course on Tuesdays, April 21 – May 26, 2026, 10 a.m. – 1 p.m. Work in your choice of acrylic or oil with structured exercises and critique.

workshops.title: Surrealist Still Life: Painting the Impossible
workshops.schedule:
Four-Week Course
Tuesdays
April 21 - May 12, 2026
6 p.m. - 9 p.m.
workshops.description: Four-week evening course on surrealist approaches to still life painting.
outcomes: Combine observation with imaginative juxtaposition
Build a surrealist still life painting
workshops.content: Surrealist Still Life: Painting the Impossible runs four Tuesday evenings, April 21 – May 12, 2026, 6:00–9:00 p.m. Explore impossible arrangements, dream logic, and painted illusion.

metadata.announcement_title: Surrealist Still Life: Painting the Impossible

Six-Week Course
Thursdays

6 - 9 p.m.
workshops.description: Six-week introduction to watercolor methods and materials.
outcomes: Control washes, glazing, and edges
Complete exercises and small compositions
materials: Watercolor set and paper per materials list
workshops.content: Watercolor Techniques is a six-week course on Thursdays, April 30 – June 4, 2026, 6–9 p.m. Focus on core methods for transparent watercolor.

Use contour, gesture, and structure in drawings
